AiBreaker.description:
Error-spike circuit breaker for a semantic transform.

A burst of consecutive invalid outputs almost always means something
systemic — a broken prompt revision, a misconfigured model, a degraded
endpoint — and under `onInvalid: drop`/`review` each one still costs
real tokens. The breaker fails the run instead of paying to discard
the rest of the dataset.

maxConsecutiveInvalid.description: Consecutive invalid-output records that abort the run.

AiBudget.description: Hard token budgets for a semantic transform.

maxRunTokens.description:
Hard ceiling on total tokens (input + output, provider-reported)
this transform may consume in one run. Ledger reuse costs nothing
against it; crossing the ceiling fails the run before dispatching
further work.

AiOutput.description: The typed output contract of a semantic transform.

AiValidation.description: Validation policy for semantic transform outputs.

onInvalid.description: What to do with records whose model output fails schema validation.

oneOf.description: The initial, still-unstable schema version.

AutoDispatchHints.description:
Planning inputs that let `execution: auto` run the online-vs-batch cost
model (architecture §18 RQ1). When either `expectedRecords` or
`deadlineSeconds` is omitted, auto falls back to online.

deadlineSeconds.description: Wall-clock deadline for completing the semantic step, in seconds.

expectedRecords.description: Expected ledger-miss record count for this step.

inputTokensPerRecord.description: Assumed input tokens per record (default 800 when planning).

outputTokensPerRecord.description: Assumed output tokens per record (default 200 when planning).

rateCard.description:
Named rate card: `mock`, `openai-compat-stub`, or `bedrock-illustrative`.
Defaults from the provider adapter id when omitted.

BoundSinkSpec.description: A sink binding with an optional upstream stage id.

oneOf.description: A PostgreSQL table loaded via native binary `COPY`.

dsnEnv.description:
Environment variable holding the connection string.

Connection strings are secrets and never appear in the document.

keys.description:
Merge-key columns for `upsert` mode; the target needs a unique
index over exactly these columns. Must be empty for `append`.

oneOf.description: Append Arrow batches to a Flight SQL endpoint (ADR 0008).

mode.description: Load semantics. Only [`SinkMode::Append`] is accepted in v1alpha1.

tokenEnv.description:
Environment variable holding an optional Bearer token.

When unset or empty, no `Authorization` header is sent.

from.description:
Upstream stage id (`source` or a transform id). When omitted, defaults
to the last transform, or `source` when there are no transforms.

id.description: Unique sink identifier within the pipeline.

oneOf.description: Always call the provider synchronously.
Always use the provider's asynchronous batch API.

FieldSpec.description: One output column of a semantic transform.

maxChars.description:
Maximum Unicode scalar values for a `utf8` field.

Required on every `ai.generate` output field. Optional on
`ai.extract` / `ai.classify`. Over-long model output fails
validation and follows `onInvalid` — never silently truncated.

nullable.description: Whether the model may return null for this column.

FieldType.description: Scalar types available to semantic transform outputs.

oneOf.description: UTF-8 string.
64-bit signed integer.
64-bit float.
Boolean.
Microsecond-precision UTC timestamp.

FormatSpec.description: File formats understood by the v1 source.

oneOf.description: Apache Parquet.
Newline-delimited JSON.

InvalidPolicy.description: Disposition of records that fail output validation.

oneOf.description: Fail the run.
Drop the record and count it.
Route the record to the review destination.
A data pipeline definition.

name.description: Pipeline name: lowercase alphanumerics and hyphens, DNS-label style.

ModelBatchSpec.description: S3-staged provider-batch configuration (Bedrock model invocation jobs).

roleArn.description:
ARN of the IAM service role the batch job assumes to read the
staged input and write results.

s3.description:
S3 staging prefix, e.g. `s3://my-bucket/pramen-batch/`. Inputs are
written under `input/`, the provider writes results under `output/`.

batch.description:
Provider-batch configuration. Required by `provider: bedrock` for
`execution: batch` (model invocation jobs stage through S3 under an
IAM role); `openai-compat` batches through the provider's Files API
and needs no configuration here.

endpoint.description: Endpoint override, primarily for self-hosted or stubbed providers.

region.description: Provider region pin, where the provider has regions.

PipelineSpecBody.description: The `spec` body of a pipeline document.

models.description: Named model configurations referenced by semantic transforms.

runtime.description: Engine tuning and checkpointing; every field has a default.

sink.description: Single sink (linear form). Mutually exclusive with [`Self::sinks`].

sinks.description:
One or more sinks for fan-out (ADR 0007). Mutually exclusive with
[`Self::sink`].

transforms.description:
Transform steps; may be empty for pure movement pipelines.

Order is the default wiring when `from` is omitted (linear). Explicit
`from` edges enable fan-out (ADR 0007); fan-in is rejected.

ResidencySpec.description:
Offline data-residency constraints for sources and models.

Locations are opaque provider identifiers compared case-sensitively to
declared `source.location` and `models.*.region` values. Schemes are
the URL scheme tokens (`s3`, `gs`, `az`, `abfs`, `abfss`, …) compared
case-insensitively. Local/`file` sources are always permitted.

allowedSchemes.description:
Optional allow-list of cloud URL schemes. When omitted, every
scheme Pramen supports is accepted.

checkpoint.description: Checkpoint location; omit to run without resumability.

maxInflightBytes.description: Ceiling on bytes in flight across all channels.

residency.description:
Optional data-residency constraints enforced at plan validation.

When set, cloud source URLs must declare [`SourceSpec`] `location`,
and that location plus every model `region` must appear in
[`ResidencySpec`] `allowedLocations`. Scheme allow-lists are
optional. Validation is declaration-only — no live cloud lookups
(ADR 0005).

targetBatchBytes.description: Target size of one Arrow batch, in bytes.

wasmOciAllowlist.description:
Digests (`sha256:…`) and/or `registry/repository` prefixes permitted
for OCI-distributed WASM components. Merged with
`PRAMEN_WASM_OCI_ALLOWLIST`. Empty (and empty env) denies all OCI pulls.

oneOf.description: Append rows; replays may duplicate unless the run is idempotent.
Stage and merge on the target's primary key for idempotent replays.
A PostgreSQL table loaded via native binary `COPY`.

dsnEnv.description:
Environment variable holding the connection string.

Connection strings are secrets and never appear in the document.

keys.description:
Merge-key columns for `upsert` mode; the target needs a unique
index over exactly these columns. Must be empty for `append`.

oneOf.description: Append Arrow batches to a Flight SQL endpoint (ADR 0008).

mode.description: Load semantics. Only [`SinkMode::Append`] is accepted in v1alpha1.

tokenEnv.description:
Environment variable holding an optional Bearer token.

When unset or empty, no `Authorization` header is sent.

oneOf.description: Files in an object store or on the local filesystem.

location.description:
Declared storage location / region for offline residency checks
(e.g. `eu-central-1`, `europe-west1`, `westeurope`). Required
when [`RuntimeSpec::residency`] is set and `url` is a cloud
scheme; never probed from the provider at plan time (ADR 0005).

url.description:
Location URL: `s3://…`, `gs://…`, `az://…` / `abfs(s)://…`,
`file://…`, or a bare local path prefix. Credentials come from
the standard provider environment, never from this document.

oneOf.description: A deterministic SQL transform over the incoming stream.

from.description:
Upstream stage id. When omitted, defaults to the previous transform
(or `source` for the first step).

query.description: SQL text; the incoming stream is visible as the table `input`.

oneOf.description: Governed semantic extraction into typed columns.

execution.description: How invocations are dispatched to the provider.

from.description:
Upstream stage id. When omitted, defaults to the previous transform
(or `source` for the first step).

inputs.description: Input column names passed to the model.

instruction.description: The fixed instruction; part of the work key.

model.description: Name of a model declared under `spec.models`.

validation.description: What happens when the model output fails validation.

oneOf.description: Governed semantic classification into typed columns.

execution.description: How invocations are dispatched to the provider.

from.description:
Upstream stage id. When omitted, defaults to the previous transform
(or `source` for the first step).

inputs.description: Input column names passed to the model.

instruction.description: The fixed instruction; part of the work key.

model.description: Name of a model declared under `spec.models`.

validation.description: What happens when the model output fails validation.

oneOf.description: Governed generation of bounded UTF-8 text fields.

execution.description: How invocations are dispatched to the provider.

from.description:
Upstream stage id. When omitted, defaults to the previous transform
(or `source` for the first step).

inputs.description: Input column names passed to the model.

instruction.description: The fixed instruction; part of the work key.

model.description: Name of a model declared under `spec.models`.

validation.description: What happens when the model output fails validation.

oneOf.description: A sandboxed WebAssembly component transform (Arrow IPC in/out).

component.description:
Component artifact: a filesystem path (absolute or relative to the
pipeline document), or an OCI reference pinned by digest
(`oci://registry/repo@sha256:…`). Tag-only OCI refs are rejected.

from.description:
Upstream stage id. When omitted, defaults to the previous transform
(or `source` for the first step).

limits.description: Resource limits enforced on every batch invocation.

WasmLimitsSpec.description: Host-enforced limits for a `type: wasm` transform.

fuel.description: Fuel budget per invocation (`None` = use the runtime default).

maxInputMb.description: Maximum Arrow IPC input size in mebibytes.

maxOutputMb.description: Maximum Arrow IPC output size in mebibytes.

memoryMb.description: Maximum guest linear memory in mebibytes.

apiVersion.description: Versioned API surface identifier; only `pramen.dev/v1alpha1` today.

metadata.description: Names and labels for the pipeline.

spec.description: The pipeline itself: models, source, transforms, sink, runtime.
